---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  TÜBİTAK BİLGEM, Contracts Department Candidate Researcher, October 2025 - ongoing

2.  Turkish Aerospace, Business Analytics Candidate Engineer, December 2024, June 2025

## Internships

1.  ASELSAN, ILS Planning and Analysis Intern, August 2025 - September 2025

2.  Turkish Aerospace, Business Analytics Intern, July 2025, August 2025

3.  Zyrone Dynamics, Production Intern, July 2024 - August 2024

# Projects

Graduation project at ASELSAN

# Competencies

Power BI, SQL

# Hobbies

Reading books, discovering new places

[Click here to download my CV (PDF)](Ozgecmis.pdf)
